title: Release bee 1.3.0: bump version tuple + split-brain fixture + manifest, self-onboard, verify, tag, push
action: Minor release 1.2.1 -> 1.3.0 (new feature: parallel scheduler). Bump BEE_VERSION in templates/lib/state.mjs + .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs (byte-identical), .version in .claude-plugin/plugin.json + .codex-plugin/plugin.json, and the hardcoded 1.2.1 anchors in test_split_brain_regression.mjs (~lines 200/205/223 — CURRENT-vendored-version fixture). Regenerate release manifest (release_manifest.mjs --write). Self-onboard beegog (onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply). Run the full recorded verify chain green. One release commit on main, tag v1.3.0, push main + tags. Skip anphabe host propagation (user instruction 2026-07-15).

truths: test_release_tuple passes reporting 1.3.0 on all 4 components
full verify chain green before tag
tag v1.3.0 points at the release commit; main + tags pushed
prohibitions: any behavior change beyond version strings

trace.verify_output: test_release_tuple: all 4 components agree on 1.3.0 (templates/lib/state.mjs, .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs, .claude-plugin, .codex-plugin); release_manifest --check: 36 files match; split_brain_regression PASS at 1.3.0; full 14-suite verify chain green
